comment_text:
Nice to see Chris, Kenny and Faruq back again!

I honestly got dizzy a few times from the editing and had to look away. I was going to joke in the comments about the editor needing to cut down on the caffeine a little, but saw everyone else commenting on it already.

Was really surprised how good the episode was, even though the adhd editing (which I think they are toning down for next ep?) was a bit much.
Honestly really high quality bots and good fights all around, nice to see Fon, Pete and Bil on the judging desk instead of the crowdvotes and the overall production quality is almost TV like.

Really enjoyed the episode and looking forward to the next one. And your review too of course!

0:50 ATOM#94?

I really enjoyed the episode and all of the fights. A few little behind the scene bits but Hypershocks new config actually managed to damage one of Huges drive gears in the first hint hence why half the drive locked up. Also in the Malice Vs End game fight Malices hurricane weapon(which is awesome) actually managed to break End games weapon bearings on that first hit meaning the End Game team had to run bushings for the weapon for the rest of their fights. Finally with editing style battlebots themselves commented on the first episode saying they've listened to our feedback on how we didn't like it in this first episode and they will be changing it but we won't see the changes just yet 😅 oh and I didn't mind the editing style either really lol 😀 and I'm looking forward to the next episode as well 😊, plus I'm looking forward to your next bots off episode 🙌.
It was a great episode. Loved the Hypershock VS HUGE and Malice VS End Game fight
